channel.title: Posts on sramazoth
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on sramazoth

item.title: Breaking ETIC Telecom IPL-DEC-220
item.description: informations Probably linked to this CVE : https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-3703 Which equipment : ETIC IPL-DEC-220 (website link) source : https://www.etictelecom.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/IPL-DEC-220-LE-272x490.png.webp Some IP addresses have been changed and screenshots may use french but sources are shown. recon TCP network scan : Network scan Webpage on 80 Home page on port 80 The page is basic, two links are present and redirect to : https://10.0.0.1//common.etic_cgi_portal/login.html https://10.0.0.1:4433/login.html Network scan didn’t find port 4433 because of my options which were very basic.

item.title: Manga, manhwa, manhua
item.description: top list 1 - Myst, Might, Mayhem 2 - Reaper of the Drifting Moon 3 - MookHyang: Dark Lady 4 - Skeleton Soldier Couldn’t Protect the Dungeon 5 - Surviving as a Genius on Borrowed Time 6 - Eternally Regressing Knight 7 - The World After the End 8 - The Great Mage Returns After 4000 Years 9 - Return of the Mount Hua Sect 10 - Nano Machine 11 - Chronicles of the Lazy Sovereign 12 - Kill the Hero 13 - Helmut the Forsaken Child 14 - The Beginning After the End 15 - The Sheperd Wizard 16 - Mercenary Enrollment 17 - Second Life Ranker 18 - Mookhyang: The Origin 19 - Debtbound by Blood 20 - Of Machines and Beasts 21 - Demon Magic Emperor everything title chapter status demon magic emperor 443 ongoing tales of demons and gods 384 ongoing nano machine 301 ongoing the great mage returns after 4000 years 246 ongoing skeleton soldier couldn’t protect the dungeon 212 ongoing solo leveling 200 finished the return of the crazy demon 192 ongoing the heavenly demon can’t live a normal life 189 ongoing mercenary enrollment 176 ongoing revenge of the iron blooded sword hound 152 ongoing kill the hero 143 finished shingeki no kyojin 139 finished the world after the end 138 ongoing return of the mount hua sect 134 ongoing the immortal emperor luo wuji has returned 130 ongoing reaper of the drifting moon 128 ongoing sword fanatic wonders through the night 123 ongoing helmut the forsaken child 122 ongoing duke pendragon 119 ongoing boss in school 118 ongoing solo max-level newbie 115 ongoing reborn as the heavenly demon 110 ongoing the second coming of gluttony 109 ongoing myst might mayhem 107 ongoing wandering warrior of wudang 104 ongoing the lone necromancer 103 ongoing doctor’s rebirth 101 ongoing is this hero for real 101 finished mookhyang dark lady 100 ongoing i grow stronger by eating 100 finished eternally regressing knight 98 ongoing academy’s undercover professor 93 ongoing return to player 90 ongoing dokgo 90 finished player who returned 10,000 years later 89 ongoing my dad is too strong 88 ongoing second life ranker 86 ongoing the max level player’s 100th regression 82 ongoing heavenly inquisition sword 82 ongoing damn reincarnation 81 ongoing return of the 8th class magician 81 finished the tutorial tower of the advanced player 80 ongoing solo bug player 80 ongoing surviving as a genius on borrowed time 75 ongoing return of the sss class ranker 72 ongoing i obtained a mythic item 69 ongoing slave b 67 ongoing my school life pretending to be a worthless person 65 ongoing genius prismatic mage 64 ongoing dungeon odyssey 62 ongoing return of the frozen player 60 ongoing i am the fated villain 60 ongoing return of the disaster-class hero 60 ongoing emperor domination 60 ongoing how to live as a villain 57 ongoing existence 57 ongoing memorize 54 ongoing devil returns to school days 53 ongoing relife player 52 ongoing mount hua sect’s genius phantom swordsman 52 ongoing killer pietro 51 ongoing the greatest estate developer 50 ongoing the last human 50 ongoing seoul station druid 50 ongoing survival story of a sword king in a fantasy world 50 ongoing return of the broken constellation 49 ongoing logging 10000 years into the future 48 ongoing seoul station necromancer 47 ongoing infinite mage 47 ongoing youngest scion of the mages 47 ongoing mookhyang the origin 47 finished lag limitless passive skills 45 ongoing warrior high school 45 ongoing the magic tower’s problem child 44 ongoing mashle 43 ongoing standard of reincarnation 42 ongoing the demonic cult instructor returns 41 ongoing reformation of the swords grand saga chapter 40 ongoing regressor of the fallen family 40 ongoing bloodhound’s regression instincts 40 ongoing your talent is mine 40 ongoing regressor instruction manual 40 ongoing hoarding in hell 40 ongoing legend of the northern blade 40 ongoing escort warrior 40 ongoing the hero returns 39 ongoing reincarnator 39 ongoing heavenly sword’s grand saga 39 ongoing transmigrating 0 ongoing genome 0 ongoing frieren 0 ongoing nanato kaoru 0 ongoing

item.title: Little binary to reverse
item.description: The challenge is available here: my github The code has 5 functions : main : main function called when binary is executed. jacky_tunning_banniere : do nothing but showing a cool banner at binary launch. uncipher_file : will uncipher a file with the secret_key (hardcoded :p). est_ce_une_bonne_cle : check whether or not the key is correct. regex_match : function to use regex (totally not taken online). Binary has some options available, but not given that easily (strings).

item.title: Root Galaxy A14
item.description: warning The phone is going to be reset two times. Ressources : Root All Samsung Galaxy 2023 Android 13 : to root the phone Samsung Bootloder Unlock Oem Unlock Android 13/14 : to deactivate OEM requirements firmware To find the phone firmware version it’s possible to navigate to : settings->about->software information->baseband version : A145RXXU1AWD1 Then we can download the corresponding file from https://samfw.com/firmware/SM-A145R/SFR/A145RXXU1AWD1. unzip SAMFW.COM_SM-A145R_SFR_A145RXXU1AWD1_fac.zip ll -rw-rw-r--. 1 pouetpouet pouetpouet 6038610042 18 avril 21:00 AP_A145RXXU1AWD1_A145RXXU1AWD1_MQB64354567_REV00_user_low_ship_MULTI_CERT_meta_OS13.

item.title: Setting and using scapy mitm
item.description: requirements two physical network interfaces : ip a 1: lo: [ . . . ] 2: eth0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state DOWN group default qlen 1000 link/ether 50:81:40:78:96:ac brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff 3: eth1: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state DOWN group default qlen 1000 link/ether 50:81:40:88:85:bd brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff scapy is installed and working (already done if using kali) two equipments talking to each other using a physical network (server and client on the sketch), I’m not doing wireless mitm here it might be useful to disable NetworkManager to avoid interfaces to go off : sudo systemctl disable NetworkManager sudo systemctl stop NetworkManager sketch Mitm setup
